gaps: No existing test case covers the Custom Button settings screen at all — all existing tests focus on Home screen, device list, connection status, and device images.
No test validates that the Custom Button setting reflects a provider change (e.g., locked to Microsoft Teams) when the headset is connected to a PC via USB.
No test covers the scenario where a headset is disconnected from a PC (USB) and the app fails to refresh the Custom Button setting to reflect the unlocked/default state.
No test validates settings persistence/refresh across a USB disconnect event without app restart — this is a lifecycle/state synchronization gap.
No test covers the locked/unlocked state of the Custom Button setting based on external connection (PC USB) to the headset.
No test validates that the app UI refreshes its state from the headset when an external connection event (USB disconnect) occurs, without requiring an app kill/relaunch.

No test covers the specific scenario of a headset being simultaneously connected to both a PC (via USB) and a mobile device (via Bluetooth), and how settings behave during transitions of the PC connection.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-001: Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' when headset is connected to PC via USB
steps: 1. Ensure headset is NOT connected to any PC via USB. Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the connected [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Custom Button.
3. Verify the Custom Button setting shows available options (e.g., Mute, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, etc.) and is NOT locked.
4. Connect the headset to a PC via USB cable.
5. On the PC, launch Microsoft Teams and ensure the headset is selected as the audio device.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device (do NOT restart the app).
7. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
8. Observe the Custom Button setting display.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' (or equivalent locked state indicator) and the option is grayed out / not user-editable, reflecting that the headset is connected to a PC running Microsoft Teams.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-002: Custom Button remains locked to Microsoft Teams after app background/foreground while headset is still connected to PC
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running (as in TC-CUSTOM-BTN-001), ensure Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. Press the Home button on the mobile device to background the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Wait 10 seconds, then reopen the app from the recent apps list.
4. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
5. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting still shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' and remains grayed out / non-editable. The locked state persists across app background/foreground cycles while the USB connection to PC is active.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-003: Custom Button refreshes to unlocked/default state after disconnecting headset from PC (USB disconnect) — no app restart
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' in the app.
2. Disconnect the USB cable from the headset (or PC).
3. Wait 5-10 seconds for the headset to process the disconnect.
4. WITHOUT restarting the app, navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
5. Observe the Custom Button setting display and interactability.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting automatically refreshes to show the unlocked/default state. The 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' indicator is gone, and the user can now select from available options (e.g., Mute, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, etc.). No app restart or force-kill is required.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-004: Custom Button state persists correctly after USB disconnect → reconnect cycle without app restart
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. Disconnect the USB cable from the headset.
3. Wait 5 seconds, then navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button and verify it shows unlocked/default state.
4. Reconnect the USB cable to the headset (PC still running Microsoft Teams).
5. Wait 5-10 seconds for the headset to re-establish the connection.
6. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
7. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 3: Custom Button shows unlocked/default state. Step 6: Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' again, reflecting the re-established PC connection. The app correctly transitions between locked and unlocked states without requiring a restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-005: Custom Button locked state survives app force-kill and relaunch while headset is connected to PC
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps).
3. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
5. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting still shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' and is grayed out. The locked state is correctly fetched from the headset upon app relaunch, confirming the headset persists the locked state information.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-006: Custom Button unlocked state survives app force-kill and relaunch after USB disconnect
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. Disconnect the USB cable from the headset.
3. Wait 5 seconds.
4. Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
7. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting shows the unlocked/default state with all options available for selection. The app correctly fetches the current state from the headset upon relaunch, reflecting that the PC connection is no longer active.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-007: Custom Button locked state changes when switching PC provider from Microsoft Teams to Zoom while headset is connected via USB
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. On the PC, close Microsoft Teams and open Zoom.
3. Ensure the headset is selected as the audio device in Zoom.
4. Wait 5-10 seconds.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (do NOT restart).
6. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
7. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting updates to show 'Locked to Zoom' (or equivalent), reflecting the change in PC provider from Microsoft Teams to Zoom. The app refreshes the locked state without requiring a restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-008: Custom Button shows unlocked state when headset is connected to mobile via Bluetooth only (no PC USB connection)
steps: 1. Ensure headset is NOT connected to any PC via USB. Headset should only be connected to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the connected [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Custom Button.
4. Observe the Custom Button setting display and available options.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting shows the unlocked/default state. All available options (e.g., Mute, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Amazon Chime, etc.) are selectable and editable. No 'Locked to...' indicator is present.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-009: Custom Button locked state persists when switching between mobile app screens (navigating away and back) while headset is connected to PC
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. Tap the Back button to return to the main device screen.
3. Tap [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Custom Button.
4. Verify Custom Button still shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
5. Navigate to the Home screen (tap back twice or use navigation).
6. Tap the device again → Audio Settings → Custom Button.
7. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: At steps 4 and 7, the Custom Button setting consistently shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' and remains grayed out. The locked state is preserved across all navigation transitions within the app.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-010: Custom Button state refresh after USB disconnect while app is in background — then brought to foreground
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. Press the Home button to background the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. While the app is backgrounded, disconnect the USB cable from the headset.
4. Wait 10 seconds.
5. Bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground (from recent apps).
6. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
7. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting shows the unlocked/default state. The app correctly refreshes its state upon returning to the foreground, detecting that the USB connection is no longer active, without requiring a manual restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-011: Custom Button locked state persists after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect while headset remains connected to PC via USB
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. On the mobile device, turn off Bluetooth.
3. Wait 5 seconds.
4. Turn Bluetooth back on and allow the headset to reconnect.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app (if not already open).
6. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
7. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting still shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams' and is grayed out. The locked state is determined by the PC USB connection, not the Bluetooth connection, so a Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect does not change the locked state.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CUSTOM-BTN-012: Custom Button locked state clears when PC provider app (Microsoft Teams) is closed on PC while USB is still connected
steps: 1. With headset connected to PC via USB and Microsoft Teams running, verify Custom Button shows 'Locked to Microsoft Teams'.
2. On the PC, close/quit Microsoft Teams completely.
3. Wait 10-15 seconds for the headset to detect the provider change.
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (do NOT restart).
5. Navigate to Audio Settings → Custom Button.
6. Observe the Custom Button setting.
generated_testcases.expected: The Custom Button setting shows the unlocked/default state. Even though the USB cable is still physically connected, the absence of a running provider app (Microsoft Teams) means the button is no longer locked. The app correctly refreshes to reflect this state change.
